/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_CA.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_IN.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_MM.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_RF.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_SD.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_US_1.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_US_2.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_VW.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_RF_A.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/ID_US_A.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/opl.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_MAIN.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_TEXT.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_DEMO.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_GAME1.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_GAME2.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_GAME3.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_STATE.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_PLAY1.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_PLAY2.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_SPEC.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_ACT1.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_ACT2.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM_ACT3.c.o CMakeFiles/bmenace1.dir/SRC/BM1INTRO.c.o -o bmenace1  -lSDL2 -lm
